name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

(* --algorithm MutualExclusion
  \* Each process runs in parallel
  \* --process P(i)
  \* do
  \*   state[i] := "trying";
  \*   \* Wait until all other processes are not in critical
  \*   \* --while \E j \in 1..N : j # i /\ state[j] = "critical"
  \*   \*   skip
  \*   \* od
  \*   state[i] := "critical";
  \*   \* Critical section
  \*   \* --while state[i] = "critical"
  \*   \*   skip
  \*   \* od
  \*   state[i] := "idle";
  \* od
end
*)

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "idle"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "trying"
    /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "critical"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Each participant can be in one of the following states *)
ParticipantState == {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Coordinator can be in one of the following states *)
CoordinatorState == {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Messages are tuples: [sender \in Participants \cup {coordinator}, receiver \in Participants \cup {coordinator}, type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants \cup {coordinator},
            receiver \in Participants \cup {coordinator},
            type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]

(* All messages in the system *)
Messages == {m \in Message}

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ participants \in [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ coordinator \in CoordinatorState
        /\ coordinator = "Init"
        /\ messages = {}

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
SendPrepare == /\ coordinator = "Init"
               /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator,
                                               receiver |-> p,
                                               type |-> "Prepare"] : p \in Participants }
               /\ coordinator' = "Prepared"
               /\ UNCHANGED participants

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes Yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes == /\ \E p \in Participants :
                      /\ participants[p] = "Init"
                      /\ \E m \in messages :
                         /\ m.sender = coordinator
                         /\ m.receiver = p
                         /\ m.type = "Prepare"
                      /\ messages' = messages \ { m : m.sender = coordinator /\ m.receiver = p /\ m.type = "Prepare" }
                      /\ messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> p,
                                                     receiver |-> coordinator,
                                                     type |-> "VoteYes"] }
                      /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
                      /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes No *)
ParticipantVoteNo == /\ \E p \in Participants :
                     /\ participants[p] = "Init"
                     /\ \E m \in messages :
                        /\ m.sender = coordinator
                        /\ m.receiver = p
                        /\ m.type = "Prepare"
                     /\ messages' = messages \ { m : m.sender = coordinator /\ m.receiver = p /\ m.type = "Prepare" }
                     /\ messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> p,
                                                    receiver |-> coordinator,
                                                    type |-> "VoteNo"] }
                     /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
                     /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

(* Coordinator receives all VoteYes and sends Commit *)
CoordinatorCommit == /\ coordinator = "Prepared"
                    /\ \A p \in Participants :
                       /\ \E m \in messages :
                          /\ m.sender = p
                          /\ m.receiver = coordinator
                          /\ m.type = "VoteYes"
                    /\ messages' = messages \ { m : m.receiver = coordinator /\ m.type \in {"VoteYes", "VoteNo"} }
                    /\ messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> coordinator,
                                                    receiver |-> p,
                                                    type |-> "Commit"] : p \in Participants }
                    /\ coordinator' = "Committed"
                    /\ UNCHANGED participants

(* Coordinator receives any VoteNo and sends Abort *)
CoordinatorAbort == /\ coordinator = "Prepared"
                    /\ \E p \in Participants :
                       /\ \E m \in messages :
                          /\ m.sender = p
                          /\ m.receiver = coordinator
                          /\ m.type = "VoteNo"
                    /\ messages' = messages \ { m : m.receiver = coordinator /\ m.type \in {"VoteYes", "VoteNo"} }
                    /\ messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> coordinator,
                                                    receiver |-> p,
                                                    type |-> "Abort"] : p \in Participants }
                    /\ coordinator' = "Aborted"
                    /\ UNCHANGED participants

(* Participant receives Commit and moves to Committed *)
ParticipantCommit == /\ \E p \in Participants :
                     /\ participants[p] = "Prepared"
                     /\ \E m \in messages :
                        /\ m.sender = coordinator
                        /\ m.receiver = p
                        /\ m.type = "Commit"
                     /\ messages' = messages \ { m : m.sender = coordinator /\ m.receiver = p /\ m.type = "Commit" }
                     /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
                     /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

(* Participant receives Abort and moves to Aborted *)
ParticipantAbort == /\ \E p \in Participants :
                     /\ participants[p] = "Prepared"
                     /\ \E m \in messages :
                        /\ m.sender = coordinator
                        /\ m.receiver = p
                        /\ m.type = "Abort"
                     /\ messages' = messages \ { m : m.sender = coordinator /\ m.receiver = p /\ m.type = "Abort" }
                     /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
                     /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ SendPrepare
      \/ ParticipantVoteYes
      \/ ParticipantVoteNo
      \/ CoordinatorCommit
      \/ CoordinatorAbort
      \/ ParticipantCommit
      \/ ParticipantAbort

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ participants \in [p \in Participants |-> ParticipantState]
          /\ coordinator \in CoordinatorState
          /\ messages \in Messages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* State of each philosopher: "thinking", "hungry", "eating" *)
TypeOK == forks \in [1..N -> 1..N] /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state: all forks owned by philosopher 1, all philosophers thinking *)
Init == forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 1] /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper to get left and right fork indices *)
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
Hungry(i) == state[i] = "thinking" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

(* Action: philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
TakeForks(i) == state[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[Left(i)] = 1 /\ forks[Right(i)] = 1
               /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
               /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down forks *)
PutForks(i) == state[i] = "eating" /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 1, ![Right(i)] = 1]
               /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Next action: any philosopher can become hungry, or if hungry and forks free, take them, or if eating, put them down *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N : (Hungry(i) \/ TakeForks(i) \/ PutForks(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES num, flag

(* TypeOK ensures num and flag are functions with appropriate domains *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
    /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state: all processes have number 0 and are not choosing *)
Init == 
    /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Next action: process i chooses a number and then enters critical section *)
Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max([num[j] | j \in 1..N])]
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, head, tail, size, full, empty

vars == <<queue, head, tail, size, full, empty>>

Init == /\ queue = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0
        /\ full = FALSE
        /\ empty = TRUE

ProducerAction == /\ full = FALSE
                 /\ queue[tail] = 0
                 /\ queue' = [queue EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ full' = (size + 1 = K)
                 /\ empty' = FALSE
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<head, queue, size, full, empty>>

ConsumerAction == /\ empty = FALSE
                 /\ queue[head] = 1
                 /\ queue' = [queue EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ empty' = (size - 1 = 0)
                 /\ full' = FALSE
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, queue, size, full, empty>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == 
  /\ readers \in Nat
  /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

Init == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

AcquireRead == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers' = readers + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReleaseRead == 
  /\ readers > 0
  /\ readers' = readers - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

AcquireWrite == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

ReleaseWrite == 
  /\ writer_active = TRUE
  /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == 
  \/ AcquireRead
  \/ ReleaseRead
  \/ AcquireWrite
  \/ ReleaseWrite

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

TypeOK ==
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot : Nat, value : Nat]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot : Nat, value : Nat]]
  /\ chosen \in Nat

Init ==
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
  /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
  /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(j) ==
  /\ proposers[j].ballot' = proposers[j].ballot + 1
  /\ proposers[j].value' = proposers[j].value
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(j) ==
  /\ LET maxBallot = Max([i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i].ballot]) IN
     /\ proposers[j].ballot' = maxBallot
     /\ proposers[j].value' = proposers[j].value
     /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> proposers[j].ballot', value |-> proposers[j].value']]
     /\ chosen' = proposers[j].value

Next ==
  \/ \E j \in 1..M : Prepare(j)
  \/ \E j \in 1..M : Accept(j)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES acked_chunks, chunks, file, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq(CHAR)
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks \in Seq(Seq(CHAR))
    /\ sent_chunks \in FiniteSet(Seq(CHAR))
    /\ retransmit_count \in FiniteSet(Seq(CHAR))
    /\ acked_chunks \in FiniteSet(Seq(CHAR))

Init ==
    /\ file = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> "x"]  \* placeholder file content
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 
        SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, Min(i*CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE))]
    /\ sent_chunks = {}
    /\ retransmit_count = {}
    /\ acked_chunks = {}

SendChunk ==
    /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks \cup {chunk}
    /\ retransmit_count' = [retransmit_count EXCEPT ![chunk] = 
        IF chunk \in retransmit_count THEN retransmit_count[chunk] + 1 ELSE 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, acked_chunks>>

AckChunk ==
    /\ acked_chunks' = acked_chunks \cup {chunk}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count>>

RetransmitChunk ==
    /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
    /\ retransmit_count' = [retransmit_count EXCEPT ![chunk] = 
        IF chunk \in retransmit_count THEN retransmit_count[chunk] + 1 ELSE 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, acked_chunks>>

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in chunks \setminus sent_chunks :
        /\ chunk \notin acked_chunks
        /\ chunk \notin retransmit_count
        /\ SendChunk
    \/ \E chunk \in chunks \setminus acked_chunks :
        /\ chunk \in retransmit_count
        /\ retransmit_count[chunk] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ RetransmitChunk
    \/ \E chunk \in chunks \setminus acked_chunks :
        /\ chunk \in retransmit_count
        /\ retransmit_count[chunk] >= MAX_RETRIES
        /\ AckChunk

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count, acked_chunks>>

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES data, activeTxns, committedTxns, abortedTxns, nextTxnId

TypeOK ==
  /\ data \in FiniteFunctions
  /\ activeTxns \in FiniteFunctions
  /\ committedTxns \in FiniteFunctions
  /\ abortedTxns \in FiniteFunctions
  /\ nextTxnId \in Nat

Init ==
  /\ data = <<>>
  /\ activeTxns = <<>>
  /\ committedTxns = <<>>
  /\ abortedTxns = <<>>
  /\ nextTxnId = 1

BeginTxn ==
  /\ nextTxnId' = nextTxnId + 1
  /\ activeTxns' = Append(activeTxns, <<nextTxnId, <<>> >>)
  /\ committedTxns' = committedTxns
  /\ abortedTxns' = abortedTxns
  /\ data' = data

ReadTxn(tid, key) ==
  /\ tid \in DOMAIN activeTxns
  /\ key \in DOMAIN data
  /\ data[key] = activeTxns[tid][key]

WriteTxn(tid, key, val) ==
  /\ tid \in DOMAIN activeTxns
  /\ activeTxns' = [activeTxns EXCEPT ![tid] = [activeTxns[tid] EXCEPT ![key] = val]]
  /\ data' = data
  /\ nextTxnId' = nextTxnId
  /\ committedTxns' = committedTxns
  /\ abortedTxns' = abortedTxns

CommitTxn(tid) ==
  /\ tid \in DOMAIN activeTxns
  /\ \A key \in DOMAIN activeTxns[tid] :
       \A otherTid \in DOMAIN activeTxns :
          otherTid # tid
          => activeTxns[otherTid][key] # activeTxns[tid][key]
  /\ committedTxns' = Append(committedTxns, <<tid, activeTxns[tid]>>)
  /\ activeTxns' = [activeTxns EXCEPT ![tid] = UNCHANGED]
  /\ data' = [data EXCEPT ![key] = activeTxns[tid][key] : key \in DOMAIN activeTxns[tid]]
  /\ nextTxnId' = nextTxnId

AbortTxn(tid) ==
  /\ tid \in DOMAIN activeTxns
  /\ abortedTxns' = Append(abortedTxns, <<tid, activeTxns[tid]>>)
  /\ activeTxns' = [activeTxns EXCEPT ![tid] = UNCHANGED]
  /\ data' = data
  /\ nextTxnId' = nextTxnId

Next ==
  \/ BeginTxn
  \/ \E tid \in DOMAIN activeTxns : \E key \in DOMAIN data : \E val \in Nat :
         WriteTxn(tid, key, val)
  \/ \E tid \in DOMAIN activeTxns :
         CommitTxn(tid)
  \/ \E tid \in DOMAIN activeTxns :
         AbortTxn(tid)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<data, activeTxns, committedTxns, abortedTxns, nextTxnId>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Updates

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup Updates]
          /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = infected[i] \cup Updates]
        \/ \E i, j \in 1..N :
          /\ i # j
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup known[j]]
          /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = infected[i] \cup infected[j]]
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![j] = known[j] \cup known[i]]
          /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![j] = infected[j] \cup infected[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients
VARIABLES allocated, free


Pages == 1..N

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free' = free \ {p}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
          /\ /\ p \in free
              /\ c \in Clients
          \/ /\ free' = free \cup {p}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
          /\ /\ p \in Pages \ free
              /\ c \in Clients
              /\ p \in allocated[c]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \subseteq [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ /\ \A c \in Clients: IsFiniteSet(allocated[c])

VARIABLES subscribers, messages


  end loop

*)

TypeOK ==

  messages \in Seq([Topic)

Init == 
  subscribers = [topic \in Topic |-> << >>] /\ 
  messages = << >>

Next == 
  \/ (* publisher posts a message *)
     /\ \E topic \in Topic : \E content \in Content :
        messages' = Append(messages, << topic, content >>) /\ 
        subscribers' = subscribers
  \/ (* broker delivers a message *)
     /\ messages # << >> /\ 
        \E topic \in Topic : \E content \in Content : \E subs \in Seq(Subscriber) :
           messages' = Tail(messages) /\ 
           subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![topic] = subs] /\ 
           subscribers[topic] = subs

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>> ==

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
      /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants
  \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
      /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
      /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
      /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0,1}
          /\ wants \in [ {0,1} -> BOOLEAN ]

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node

VARIABLES counts

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node:
          /\ \E m \in Node:
              /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = counts[n][m] + 1]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>> \ {n}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

GlobalCount(n) == \E m \in Node: counts[n][m]

TotalCount == \E n \in Node: GlobalCount(n)

====
